Employee_PositiveSalary.Input_NL_Requirement: an employee's salary must always be a strictly positive value.

Employee_AdultAge.Input_NL_Requirement: every employee must be an adult, meaning their age must be strictly greater than 18.

Person_MaleHusband.Input_NL_Requirement: if a person is associated with a husband, that person must be female.

Person_FemaleWife.Input_NL_Requirement: if a person is associated with a wife, that person must be male.

Person_SpouseIsMarried.Input_NL_Requirement: if a person has a recorded spouse (either a husband or a wife), their civil status must be explicitly set to 'married'.
Person_SpouseIsMarried.Ground_Truth_OCL: (not self.husband.oclIsUndefined() or not self.wife.oclIsUndefined()) implies self.civstat = 'married'

Rental_CheckDates.Input_NL_Requirement: the from date of a rental must always occur strictly before its until date,representing the rental period formatted strictly as YYYYMMDD.

Dept_BudgetConstraint.Input_NL_Requirement: a department's allocated budget is always greater than or equal to the sum of the salaries of all employees currently working within that department.

Dept_MinStaff.Input_NL_Requirement: every department is required to have at least one employee assigned to it.

Dept_AverageSalary.Input_NL_Requirement: The average salary of employees in a department must not exceed 80000.

Edge_NoBidirectionalSelfLoop.Input_NL_Requirement: A Node must not have any Edge that serves as both an incoming and an outgoing edge simultaneously (this prevents direct self-loops).

Edge_NoSelfLoop.Input_NL_Requirement: the source node of any given edge must always be distinct from its target node.

Node_EdgeBagVsSet.Input_NL_Requirement: The total number of edge references of a node, counted with multiplicity (each shared edge counted once for outgoing and once for incoming), must be at least the count of distinct edges.

LoyaltyAccount_AdultMembership.Input_NL_Requirement: A customer must be at least 18 years old to enroll in a program.

LoyaltyAccount_NoNegativePoints.Input_NL_Requirement: The points in any loyalty account cannot be negative.

LoyaltyAccount_MaleProgram.Input_NL_Requirement: If a customer is enrolled in a program, and the program's name is 'MaleProgram', then the customer must be male.

Project_BudgetSufficiency.Input_NL_Requirement: A Project's budget must be sufficient to cover the salaries of all employees working on it. Specifically, the project budget must be greater than or equal to the sum of salaries of its assigned employees.

Polygon_NoThreeConsecutiveCollinear.Input_NL_Requirement: For any three distinct points in a polygon (p1, p2, p3), they must not be collinear (on the same line). This ensures the polygon has a valid shape without any redundant vertices.
Polygon_NoThreeConsecutiveCollinear.Ground_Truth_OCL: self.points->forAll(p1, p2, p3 | (p1 <> p2 and p2 <> p3 and p1 <> p3) implies (p2.x - p1.x)*(p3.y - p1.y) <> (p2.y - p1.y)*(p3.x - p1.x))

Employee_NoSelfManager.Input_NL_Requirement: An employee cannot be their own manager.

Employee_ManagerSalary.Input_NL_Requirement: A manager's salary must be strictly greater than the salary of any of their subordinates.

Employee_SalaryCeiling.Input_NL_Requirement: An employee's salary ceiling is their manager's salary if they report to a manager; otherwise, it is 500000 (the executive maximum). The employee's salary must not exceed this ceiling.
Employee_SalaryCeiling.Ground_Truth_OCL: self.salary <= if not self.manager.oclIsUndefined() then self.manager.salary else 500000 endif

Stack_SizeNonNegative.Input_NL_Requirement: The number of elements in the stack must always be greater than or equal to zero. It is structurally impossible for a stack to have a negative size.

Flight_ArrivalAfterDeparture.Input_NL_Requirement: A flight's arrivalTime must be strictly greater than its departureTime.

Flight_CapacityCheck.Input_NL_Requirement: The number of passengers booked on a flight must not exceed the capacity of the assigned plane.

Flight_CapacityUtilization.Input_NL_Requirement: A flight's capacity utilization ratio (passenger count divided by plane capacity) must not exceed 0.9, ensuring at least 10% of seats remain available for operational flexibility.

Cell_ValueRange.Input_NL_Requirement: The value of any cell must be an integer between 1 and 9 (inclusive).

Row_UniqueValues.Input_NL_Requirement: All cells belonging to the same Row must have unique values. No two cells in a row can share the same number.

Member_MaxBooks.Input_NL_Requirement: A member cannot have more than 5 books borrowed at any given time.

Member_NoLoanIfFined.Input_NL_Requirement: If a member has a fine greater than 0, they are blocked from borrowing. This means if fine > 0, their list of borrowed books must be empty (or they must return all books before having a fine).

Car_DoorLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: A Car must have between 2 and 5 doors (inclusive).

Truck_LoadLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: A Truck must be heavy-duty, meaning its maxLoad must be greater than 1000 kg.

Show_CapacityLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: The number of tickets sold for a show must not exceed the capacity of the hall where it is screened.

Show_UniqueSeats.Input_NL_Requirement: Every ticket for a specific show must have a unique seatNo. No double booking of seats is allowed.

Thermostat_ValidTargetTemp.Input_NL_Requirement: A Thermostat's target temperature must always be between 16 and 30 degrees Celsius.

Thermostat_PhysicsCheck.Input_NL_Requirement: The current temperature measured by a Thermostat cannot be lower than absolute zero (-273 degrees).

HVACUnit_ModeConflict.Input_NL_Requirement: An HVACUnit cannot be in both "heating" and "cooling" modes simultaneously.

Room_WindowOpenHVACStatus.Input_NL_Requirement: If a Window in a Room is currently open, the HVACUnit assigned to that room must be turned off (active status is false) to save energy.

Building_MaxPowerLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: The total power consumption of all active HVACUnits in the Building must not exceed the Building's maximum power capacity.

Room_SafetyEgress.Input_NL_Requirement: Every Room must have at least one window installed for safety.

Room_AutoActivation.Input_NL_Requirement: If the Thermostat detects a temperature difference (gap between current and target) greater than 5 degrees, the HVACUnit must be active.

User_MaxCards.Input_NL_Requirement: A User cannot hold more than 3 distinct KeyCards.

SecurityHub_IntrusionAlert.Input_NL_Requirement: If a Sensor is "triggered" (detecting intrusion) and the Zone is "armed," the SecurityHub must be in an "Alert" state.
SecurityHub_IntrusionAlert.Ground_Truth_OCL: self.zones->exists(z | z.isArmed and z.sensors->exists(s | s.isTriggered)) implies self.isAlertState

Zone_SecureBeforeArming.Input_NL_Requirement: A Zone cannot be set to "armed" if any of its contact sensors are currently open (e.g., a door is ajar).
Zone_SecureBeforeArming.Ground_Truth_OCL: self.sensors->exists(s | s.type = 'contact' and s.isOpen) implies self.isArmed = false

KeyCard_AccessLevelCheck.Input_NL_Requirement: Users can only enter a Zone if their KeyCard has an access level greater than or equal to the Zone's required security level.

SecurityHub_NonNegativeTriggers.Input_NL_Requirement: The SecurityHub must track the total number of triggered sensors; this count cannot be negative.

BatteryBank_ValidCharge.Input_NL_Requirement: The BatteryBank's charge level is a percentage and must be in the range of 0 to 100 inclusive.

Controller_BlackoutProtocol.Input_NL_Requirement: If the GridConnection status is "Down" (blackout), the Controller must be in "IslandMode".

SolarPanel_EfficiencyRange.Input_NL_Requirement: Each SolarPanel tracks its efficiency mode, which must be a value between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive.

Controller_NonNegativeSolar.Input_NL_Requirement: The total power output of all SolarPanels must be non-negative.

Controller_SolarCurtailment.Input_NL_Requirement: If the BatteryBank is fully charged (100%) and the Grid is not exporting energy, every SolarPanel must operate below maximum capacity (efficiency mode < 1.0) to prevent overvoltage.

Vessel_CapacityLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: A Vessel has a maximum weight capacity (maxTonnage). The sum of the weights of all loaded Containers must not exceed this limit.

Container_PositiveWeight.Input_NL_Requirement: A Container's weight must be strictly positive.

Vessel_ReefersNeedPower.Input_NL_Requirement: If a Container is marked as "Refrigerated", it must be loaded onto a Vessel that supports power supply (hasPowerSupply = true).

Shipment_HazardousClearance.Input_NL_Requirement: A Shipment cannot be marked as "Cleared" by customs if it contains any HazardousMaterial that lacks a safety certificate ID.
Shipment_HazardousClearance.Ground_Truth_OCL: (self.isCleared and self.boxes.hazards->notEmpty()) implies self.boxes.hazards->forAll(h | not h.safetyCertID.oclIsUndefined() and h.safetyCertID <> '')

Vessel_CrewRequirement.Input_NL_Requirement: A Vessel cannot leave a Port (isDocked = false) if its current crew count is less than the minimum crew requirement.

Shipment_ValidDates.Input_NL_Requirement: The arrival date of a Shipment must be strictly later than its departure date (represented as integers for simulation, e.g., days from epoch).

Port_BerthLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: A Port cannot accommodate more Vessels than its total number of berths.

StockItem_NonNegativeQty.Input_NL_Requirement: The quantity of a StockItem cannot be negative.

StockItem_ReservationLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: The "reserved" quantity for any StockItem must be non-negative and must not exceed the total quantity on hand.

TransferRequest_ValidStatus.Input_NL_Requirement: A TransferRequest's status must be one of the valid states: 'Pending', 'Approved', 'Completed', or 'Rejected'.

TransferRequest_NoTransferToInactive.Input_NL_Requirement: If a Warehouse is marked as "Inactive" (e.g., under maintenance), it cannot be the destination for any new TransferRequests whose status is 'Pending'.

TransferRequest_PositiveAmount.Input_NL_Requirement: A TransferRequest amount must be greater than zero.

StockItem_FragileStorage.Input_NL_Requirement: Products marked as "Fragile" cannot be stored in Warehouses that do not have "SpecialHandling" capabilities.

TransferRequest_SufficientFreeStock.Input_NL_Requirement: The system calculates "FreeStock" as (quantity - reserved). A TransferRequest is only valid if the source StockItem has enough FreeStock to cover the transfer amount.

LineItem_NoSelfPurchase.Input_NL_Requirement: A Seller cannot purchase their own Listings (preventing wash trading).

Order_MinimumThreshold.Input_NL_Requirement: An order's minimum total price is determined by the applied coupon: if a coupon exists, the minimum is the coupon's minimum purchase requirement; otherwise, the minimum is 50 (a baseline order threshold). The order's total price must meet this minimum.
Order_MinimumThreshold.Ground_Truth_OCL: self.totalPrice >= if not self.coupon.oclIsUndefined() then self.coupon.minPurchaseReq else 50 endif

Order_PriceConsistency.Input_NL_Requirement: An Order's total price is the sum of (LineItem price * quantity).

Listing_ValidListingData.Input_NL_Requirement: A Listing's price and available stock must be non-negative.

LineItem_PositiveQty.Input_NL_Requirement: The quantity requested in a LineItem must be strictly greater than zero.

Order_CouponRequirement.Input_NL_Requirement: If a Coupon is applied to an Order, the Coupon's minimum purchase requirement must be less than or equal to the Order's total.

Customer_NoOverdraft.Input_NL_Requirement: The Customer's Wallet balance must be greater than or equal to 0 (no overdrafts allowed).

Seller_BannedNoActiveListings.Input_NL_Requirement: A "Banned" Seller cannot have any active Listings.

LineItem_StockLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: The quantity requested in a LineItem cannot exceed the stock available in the Listing.

Order_ShippingRule.Input_NL_Requirement: VIP Customers (isVIP = true) get free shipping; for non-VIPs, if the order weight > 10kg, shipping cost must be added (shippingCost > 0).

Patient_ValidPriority.Input_NL_Requirement: A patient's priority level must be one of the standard triage levels: 1, 3, or 5.

Bed_OccupiedConsistency.Input_NL_Requirement: A Bed cannot be assigned to more than one Patient at the same time (isOccupied status must be consistent).

Patient_CriticalInICU.Input_NL_Requirement: Patients with "Critical" priority (level 5) must be assigned to Rooms equipped with "ICU" capabilities.

Room_IsolationProtocol.Input_NL_Requirement: Infectious patients (isInfectious = true) cannot be placed in a Room that already contains non-infectious patients to prevent cross-contamination.
Room_IsolationProtocol.Ground_Truth_OCL: let p = self.beds.patient->reject(oclIsUndefined()) in not (p->exists(isInfectious) and p->exists(not isInfectious))

Room_PhysicalBedLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: The total number of physical beds associated with a Room must exactly match the room's stated bed count capacity.

Ward_StaffingRatio.Input_NL_Requirement: The system tracks the nurse-to-patient ratio for the Ward. The number of assigned Nurses must be at least 1 for every 4 patients.

Prescription_NotEmpty.Input_NL_Requirement: A Prescription cannot be empty (must contain at least one drug).

Drug_SafeAssociatedProfile.Input_NL_Requirement: If a Drug is a controlled substance, it must have at least one associated drug (either from drugA or drugB) that is NOT a controlled substance, to ensure safe alternatives exist in the interaction profile.

Patient_NoAllergicPrescriptions.Input_NL_Requirement: A Patient cannot be prescribed a Drug they are allergic to.

Prescription_LicenseCheck.Input_NL_Requirement: High-risk drugs (isControlledSubstance = true) require the prescribing Doctor to have a special "DEA_License".

LineItem_PositiveDose.Input_NL_Requirement: The dosage in any LineItem must be positive.

Prescription_ExpiryAfterIssue.Input_NL_Requirement: The expiration date of a Prescription must be strictly after its issue date.

Patient_AcetaminophenLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: The total daily dosage of "Acetaminophen" across all active prescriptions for a patient must not exceed 4000mg.

Monitor_ValidBattery.Input_NL_Requirement: A Monitor's battery level is a percentage (0-100).

Monitor_LowBatteryAlert.Input_NL_Requirement: If the Monitor is "Active" and the battery is below 10%, a "LowBattery" Alert must exist.

Monitor_ReadingsOnlyIfActive.Input_NL_Requirement: Readings are only valid if they are collected while the Monitor is "Active". Consequently, if the Monitor is in Standby (inactive), its real-time data buffer must be empty.

Monitor_HeartRateAlert.Input_NL_Requirement: For a monitor of type 'ECG', if any reading in its data stream falls outside the safe range of 60 to 100 bpm, a 'Clinical' alert must be triggered.
Monitor_HeartRateAlert.Ground_Truth_OCL: (self.type = 'ECG' and self.dataStream->exists(r | r.value < 60 or r.value > 100)) implies self.alerts->exists(a | a.type = 'Clinical')

Patient_SingleActiveDeviceType.Input_NL_Requirement: A Patient cannot be attached to more than one active Monitor of the same type (e.g., only one active ECG).
Patient_SingleActiveDeviceType.Ground_Truth_OCL: self.devices->select(d | d.isActive)->forAll(d1, d2 | d1.type = d2.type implies d1 = d2 )

Patient_ObservationProtocol.Input_NL_Requirement: The system calculates an "EarlyWarningScore". If the score is > 5, the Patient status must be set to "Observation".

Student_MaxCourses.Input_NL_Requirement: A Student cannot enroll in more than 6 course offerings in a single semester to prevent burnout.

Student_PrerequisitesCovered.Input_NL_Requirement: For every course a student is currently enrolled in, all of its prerequisite courses must be included in the student's completed courses (verified via collection containment).

CourseOffering_CapacityLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: A CourseOffering cannot accept more students than its maxCapacity.

Student_PrerequisiteSatisfaction.Input_NL_Requirement: A Student cannot enroll in a CourseOffering if they have not completed the required prerequisite Course (checked via completedCourses).

Professor_MaxTeachingLoad.Input_NL_Requirement: A Professor cannot teach more than 3 CourseOfferings in a single semester.

CourseOffering_HonorsGPA.Input_NL_Requirement: If a CourseOffering is marked as "Honors", the enrolling Student must have a GPA greater than 3.5.

Student_MaxCredits.Input_NL_Requirement: The total credit hours for a Student's current enrollments must not exceed 20.

CourseOffering_ActiveMinStudents.Input_NL_Requirement: A CourseOffering must have at least 5 students enrolled to be considered "Active"; otherwise, it is cancelled.

ExamSession_DurationLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: The duration of an ExamSession (endTime - startTime) must not exceed the Exam's allowed durationMinutes(assume all time variables are represented as integers in minutes for direct arithmetic).

ExamSession_AutoFlagging.Input_NL_Requirement: An ExamSession is marked "Flagged" if the number of SuspiciousEvents recorded exceeds 3.

Exam_TotalScoreCheck.Input_NL_Requirement: The total score of an Exam must equal the sum of the points of all its Questions.

Student_OneActiveSession.Input_NL_Requirement: A Student cannot start a new ExamSession if they have another session currently in progress (isInProgress = true).

ExamSession_HighStakesProctor.Input_NL_Requirement: If an Exam is marked as "HighStakes", it requires a proctor to be assigned (simulated by proctorId being defined/non-null string).

Exam_NonEmptyExam.Input_NL_Requirement: The number of Questions in an Exam must be positive.

Loan_MaxDurationCheck.Input_NL_Requirement: If a Member has "Faculty" status, their max loan duration is 180 days; for others, it is 30 days.

Member_BlockIfOverdue.Input_NL_Requirement: If a Member has any existing Loan that is 'Overdue', their account must be marked as blocked (isBlocked = true) to prevent borrowing new items.

Loan_ItemCondition.Input_NL_Requirement: A ResourceItem cannot be loaned out if its status is "Lost" or "Damaged".

Loan_DigitalFree.Input_NL_Requirement: Digital resources (isDigital = true) do not incur late fees (fineAmount must be 0).

Member_MaxFineBlock.Input_NL_Requirement: The total fineAmount for a Member is the sum of fines from all their Loans. If this total exceeds $50, the Member's account is marked isBlocked.

LoanRequest_MinCreditScore.Input_NL_Requirement: A Borrower must have a credit score of at least 600 to create a LoanRequest.

LoanRequest_DebtToIncomeLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: The requested loan amount cannot exceed 40% of the Borrower's annual income (Debt-to-Income ratio).

Investment_NoSelfFunding.Input_NL_Requirement: A User cannot invest in their own LoanRequest (conflict of interest).

LoanRequest_ActiveRequiresFullFunding.Input_NL_Requirement: A LoanRequest is marked "Active" (funded) only if the sum of all associated Investment amounts equals the requested amount.

Investment_PositiveAmount.Input_NL_Requirement: An Investment amount must be strictly positive.

LoanRequest_ValidInterestRate.Input_NL_Requirement: The interest rate on any loan must be between 2% and 25%.

Balance_NonNegativeBalance.Input_NL_Requirement: A Wallet's balance for any specific Token cannot be negative.

Balance_RestrictedTokenAccess.Input_NL_Requirement: If a Token is marked "Restricted" (e.g., security tokens), the User owning the Wallet must be "KYC_Verified" (Know Your Customer).

Transaction_InsufficientFunds.Input_NL_Requirement: A Transaction cannot be executed if the wallet balance is less than the transaction amount plus the transaction fee.

Transaction_SourceOwnership.Input_NL_Requirement: A Transaction can only be executed if its source balance explicitly belongs to the sender's wallet.

User_SanctionsFreeze.Input_NL_Requirement: If a User is flagged as "Sanctioned", all their Wallets must be frozen (isFrozen = true).

Transaction_MinDustLimit.Input_NL_Requirement: A Transaction amount must be greater than the minimum dust limit (0.00001).

CreditCard_OverLimitCheck.Input_NL_Requirement: The sum of all "Pending" transactions plus the current balance must not exceed the CreditCard's credit limit.
CreditCard_OverLimitCheck.Ground_Truth_OCL: let pendingAmt = self.txs->select(t | t.status = 'Pending').amount->sum() in (self.balance + pendingAmt) <= self.limit

Transaction_HighRiskCap.Input_NL_Requirement: If a Merchant is in a "HighRisk" category, the Transaction amount cannot exceed $1000.

Transaction_InternationalCheck.Input_NL_Requirement: A Transaction occurring in a country different from the CardHolder's residence requires the card to have "InternationalEnabled" set to true.

Transaction_CardExpiryCheck.Input_NL_Requirement: If a CreditCard is "Expired" (current year > expiry year), it cannot have any "New" transactions.

Transaction_LargeTxFraudAlert.Input_NL_Requirement: A FraudAlert is automatically generated if the Transaction amount is 5 times greater than the CardHolder's average transaction value.

CardHolder_MaxCards.Input_NL_Requirement: A CardHolder cannot have more than 3 active CreditCards.

Claim_EffectivePayout.Input_NL_Requirement: The effective payout of a claim is the adjuster's approved amount minus the policy deductible if an adjuster is assigned; otherwise, it is 0. The effective payout must not exceed the policy's maximum coverage.
Claim_EffectivePayout.Ground_Truth_OCL: (if not self.adjuster.oclIsUndefined() then self.adjuster.approvedAmount - self.policy.deductible else 0 endif) <= self.policy.maxCoverage

Claim_ApprovalThreshold.Input_NL_Requirement: A claim's maximum allowable amount is the policy's maximum coverage if an adjuster is assigned; otherwise, it is 0 (unassigned claims cannot be approved). The requested amount must not exceed this maximum.
Claim_ApprovalThreshold.Ground_Truth_OCL: self.requestedAmount <= if not self.adjuster.oclIsUndefined() then self.policy.maxCoverage else 0 endif

Claim_CoverageRatio.Input_NL_Requirement: The ratio of a claim's requested amount to its policy's maximum coverage must not exceed 0.8, ensuring no single claim consumes more than 80% of the policy.

Policy_AverageClaimValue.Input_NL_Requirement: If a policy has at least one claim, the average requested amount across all claims must be at least the policy's deductible, preventing the policy from being overloaded with trivial claims.

Question_ValidTopic.Input_NL_Requirement: A question's topic must be one of the standard curriculum topics: 'Algebra', 'Geometry', or 'Calculus'.

Question_ValidPoints.Input_NL_Requirement: A question's point value must be one of the standard allocations: 5, 10, or 20.

Exam_AllTopicsCovered.Input_NL_Requirement: An exam must cover all core topics. The set of topics from all questions across all sections must include all required core topics: 'Algebra', 'Geometry', and 'Calculus'.

Exam_UniqueTopicCount.Input_NL_Requirement: The number of distinct topics covered by an exam (across all sections) must not exceed 5.
